subject: Project Management
title: The Scrum Guide
description: A 60-second lesson on The Scrum Guide.

hook.text: Scrum's entire rulebook fits in 13 pages. It's the shortest framework document in PM history.

buildup.text: Sutherland and Schwaber co-authored the Scrum Guide to be the definitive reference.

discovery.text: Every update simplifies it further. The 2020 version removed prescriptive language and jargon.

twist.text: Despite 13 pages of rules, most Scrum teams don't follow them all — and many add their own.

climax.text: The guide is intentionally minimal. It tells you what to do, not how to think.

punchline.text: Thirteen pages. Millions of teams. Infinite interpretations.

quiz.question: How long is the Scrum Guide?
